creator: info@babaei.net
text: OK, I see there are new upstream updates (3.3.11 for 3.x branch and 4.0.4 for 4.x branch). Since Yuri has made some modifications to fix the original port, then I guess I should wait for his part to gets done. Then, I'll pick that up and update to the latest releases for each branch on top of his work in order to avoid redundant work.
